name: Hero to Zero
description:
RPG TF

So a long while back I saw this TF comic by Taitora (may use as a ref image later) that gave me an idea, for an RPG protagonist to be transformed into something of a lower less, like an animal or an object, and I made an ai of it. With the weird dream I had this morning (I might make something of that too~ 😈) I remembered that thing and I figured I'd make it, especially since nsfw is an option now~ (like imagine being the hero of a fantasy world only to be transformed into a sex toy or a breeding slave...)

Hope you enjoy! ;3c
creator: Kratos_Zangoose
